Engineering Portfolio

Ir. Putu Herdy Kurniawan, S.Tr.T.

Process Engineer · HVAC · Instrumentation · BMS · Energy Efficiency

Engineering professional with cross-functional experience across pharmaceutical engineering, process systems, HVAC/AHU/VRF, BMS/BAS, instrumentation, electrical utilities, and energy improvement initiatives.

View portfolio View resume
Pharmaceutical EngineeringHVAC / AHU / VRFBMS / BASInstrumentationProcess EngineeringEnergy Efficiency
systems architecture

Selected expertise

Engineering capability built from field, process, and facility experience.

A concise view of the technical areas behind the portfolio. Project pages provide the deeper case-study explanation.

01

Process Engineering

Thermal oil heating systems, process calculations, equipment documentation, and international project engineering support.

02

HVAC / AHU / VRF

Pharmaceutical HVAC troubleshooting, AHU performance review, VRF coordination, airflow, temperature, and filter monitoring.

03

Instrumentation & Control

Calibration, loop checking, preventive maintenance, corrective maintenance, transmitters, control valves, RTD, TC, pH and ORP.

04

BMS / BAS / SCADA

Azbil savic-net G5, BACnet exploration, system monitoring, alarm follow-up, dashboard planning, and operational data review.

05

Utility & Electrical Systems

LV distribution follow-up, generator interlock review, lighting automation, facility utilities, and engineering safety observations.

06

GMP & HSE Support

Engineering work in pharmaceutical environment with awareness of GMP, documentation, HSE reporting, and safe facility operation.

Featured work

Selected project case studies.

Each project page is written with context, challenge, role, approach, tools, and impact so the portfolio tells a complete engineering story.
